title: Broadway Serenade
writer: Charles Lederer, Lew Lipton, John Taintor Foote
actors: Jeanette MacDonald, Lew Ayres, Ian Hunter
plot: Mary Hale, a singer, and Jimmy Seymour, a pianist/composer, are a showbiz couple working in The Big Apple in small nightclubs hoping to hit it big. One night, Broadway producer Larry Bryant spots Mary and is taken with her beauty ...
